tweet_text: 🚨 Huge news for Barça fans: Raphinha ruled out for 5 weeks due to a hamstring injury sustained on international duty! 😢 #FCBarcelona #Raphinha
article_title: Raphinha ruled out for 5 weeks in blow to Barça

tweet_text: 🚨 Noni Madueke was forced off during the first half of England's friendly against Uruguay, adding to Arsenal's growing list of SEVEN injury concerns. ⚠️ #InjuryUpdate #ThreeLions
article_title: Noni Madueke forced off for England as Arsenal left with SEVEN injury worries

tweet_text: Ben White scored but faced boos from England fans after giving away a penalty, resulting in a 1-1 draw against Uruguay at Wembley. A tough return for the defender! 🇬🇧⚽ #ENGURU #InternationalFootball
article_title: White booed after scoring and gives away penalty in draw with Uruguay

tweet_text: 🚨 Everton to offer David Moyes a new contract this summer after his success in transforming the club from relegation candidates to European contenders! Currently sitting 8th, just 3 points off Champions League spots! ⚽️💙 #EFC #MoyesMagic
article_title: Everton to offer David Moyes new deal in recognition of success at club
